title: [phase:repair] [family:checkpoint] [provider_hint:codex] Current task: openclaw-tmux replacement. In 4 bullets max, produce a checkpoint of the current prototype state: done, remaining blockers, safest next action, and one verification command already passing. No edits.
summary_text: - **Workflow:** `.github/workflows/notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml` (already published) + `.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml` (sync hook expected by local verification). - **Scripts:** `scripts/skills/sync-notebooklm-skills.sh`, `scripts/check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh`, `scripts/harness/notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh`, `scripts/lib/notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh`. - **Skills/Config:** `config/skills/notebooklm-cli-baseline.tsv`, `skills/notebooklm-shared/**`, `skills/notebooklm-visual-brief/**`, `skills/notebooklm-slide-prep/**`. - **Hint Plumbing:** `scripts/local/sync-gh-secrets-from-env.sh`, `scripts/local/bootstrap-prod-secrets.sh`. - **Tests:** `tests/test-notebooklm-runtime-smoke.sh` (key local verification path).
